creator: flo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dan Langille from comment #15)
I don't have any issue with 1.16.4 on stable/13. Looking at the log

Mar 28 00:06:03 git gitea[35791]: [signal SIGBUS: bus error code=0x3 addr=0x24c4ebf pc=0x24c4ebf]

That leaves me to believe that something is seriously wrong with your go or gitea package. Can you rebuild the go and gitea package and try again?
